title: Cavalleria rusticana
writer: Guido Menasci, Amleto Palermi, Pier Maria Rosso di San Secondo
actors: Isa Pola, Carlo Ninchi, Doris Duranti
plot: Young Tiruddu returns home to his Sicilian village after completing his military service to find his fiancée, Lola, married to a rich and possessive businessman. But Lola soon provokes her former beau and Tiruddu succumbs to her c...
